title: (Bearish Signal) ROKU, price may drop as it breaks higher Bollinger Band on Jan 07, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could be a signal that ROKU may fall back below the higher band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 39 similar cases where ROKU's price broke its higher Bollinger Band, and 34 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $396.16 is above $223.96 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/04/20 - 01/07/21, the price experienced a +28% Uptrend. During the week of 12/30/20 - 01/07/21, the stock enjoyed a +12% Uptrend growth. 

https://preview.redd.it/n2g2z46ue5a61.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=53be0e24b8e90f36a28bac098d264662172ef8ce

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator demonstrated that the stock has entered the overbought zone. This may point to a price pull-back soon.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for ROKU turned negative on December 29, 2020. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 30 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 25 of the 30 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 83%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where ROKU declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

ROKU broke above its upper Bollinger Band on January 07, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8674950-roku-inc-ordinary-shares-s-roku-379-29-price-may-drop-as-it-breaks-higher-bollinger-band-on-jan-07-2021?utm_source=raddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
